RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_ENCHANTMENT_ASTRAL_C: This card has the effects of [gold]Unique[/gold], [gold]Retain[/gold], and [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_ENCHANTMENT_ESSENCE_: You cannot play this card manually. Whenever you receive unblocked damage, this card automatically plays from [gold]anywhere[/gold].

This card tracks plays per instance across the whole run. Every [blue]10th[/blue] play, apply [blue]9[/blue] [gold]Blazing Solar Burn[/gold] to all enemies. Each later trigger applies [blue]3[/blue] more than the previous one.
This card permanently grows per instance. Killing a normal enemy gives this card +[blue]1.5[/blue]% permanent damage. Killing an elite or boss gives +[blue]6[/blue]% permanent damage.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_ENCHANTMENT_TETRA_WA: In [gold]combat[/gold], and for this mod's events and related checks, this card counts as both an [gold]Attack[/gold] and a [gold]Skill[/gold]. If it is originally an [gold]Attack[/gold], it has [red]-1[/red] damage and grants [blue]4[/blue] Block after being played. If it is originally a [gold]Skill[/gold], it has [red]-1[/red] Block and deals [blue]4[/blue] damage to a random enemy after being played.
